element.ToolTip: First ATM VPI value to use.
element.Caption: VPI First Id

element.ToolTip: First ATM VCI value to use
element.Caption: VCI First Id

element.ToolTip: May take the following values: 0 (VCI first), 1 (VPI first), 2 (Both)
element.Caption: Increment Mode

element.ToolTip: The type of ATM transport encapsulation.
element.Caption: Encapsulation

element.ToolTip: Base value used when as first MAC address in the range.
element.Caption: MAC

element.ToolTip: Incrementor used to generate intermediary MAC addresses for a range.
element.Caption: Increment

element.ToolTip: Value of reassembly timeout in seconds.
element.Name: ctlReassemblyTimeout

element.ToolTip: Enable atm Pattern matching if true, disable if false.
element.Name: CheckEdit1

element.ToolTip: Enable Coset(header error correction) if true, disable if false.
element.Name: CheckEdit2

element.ToControlCSSource: SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ATMPlugin.reassemblyTimeout") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Max : 999999999;
SchemaInt si = Schema.GetMetaSchema("ATMPlugin.reassemblyTimeout") as SchemaInt; return (si != null) ? si.Min : 0;
